description: CompositionBlue polo jersey made of 90% polyester and 10% spandex, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a spread collar and short sleeves, buttoned chest placket and appliquéd branding on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft polyester/spandex blended fabric, this jersey from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice to wear for your tennis practice or on casual days. Team it with trackpants or shorts and tennis shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during the winter.
